Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Continued To Jan-19-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew J. Webb, for petitioner Dhekra Chaleb

Mr. Webb informed the Court that he has prepared an amended petition which responde to the Examiner's notes, and that he would be filing the amended petition today following the hearing herein. He also stated that he would be going forward to obtain appointment of a guardian ad litem. The matter was continued to January 19, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not reported)
